verses.text: The wilderness shall be glad and 'blossom as the rose,' rejoicing to see 'the glory of the LORD.' Barren places bloom. The coming of God turns desert hearts into gardens of joy.
The wilderness shall be glad and 'blossom as the rose,' rejoicing to see 'the glory of the LORD.' Barren places bloom. The coming of God turns desert hearts into gardens of joy.

'Strengthen ye the weak hands... Say to them that are of a fearful heart, Be strong... your God will come... and save you.' Comfort for the faint. God's promised coming is the courage of the trembling.

'Strengthen ye the weak hands... Say to them that are of a fearful heart, Be strong... your God will come... and save you.' Comfort for the faint. God's promised coming is the courage of the trembling.

Then 'the eyes of the blind shall be opened,' the deaf hear, the lame leap, and water spring in the desert. These are the works of Christ. The Saviour's miracles fulfilled this picture of restored creation.

Then 'the eyes of the blind shall be opened,' the deaf hear, the lame leap, and water spring in the desert. These are the works of Christ. The Saviour's miracles fulfilled this picture of restored creation.

Then 'the eyes of the blind shall be opened,' the deaf hear, the lame leap, and water spring in the desert. These are the works of Christ. The Saviour's miracles fulfilled this picture of restored creation.

A highway of holiness shall be there for the redeemed, and 'the ransomed of the LORD shall return... with songs and everlasting joy.' The way home is sure. The redeemed travel the holy road to Zion, and sorrow flees away.
